phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Boudin beach scene paintings are
phrases.text_local: Où se trouvent les tableaux de Boudin représentant les plages de Normandie ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lay tah-BLOH duh boo-DAHN ruh-pray-zahn-TAHN lay PLAHJ duh nor-mahn-DEE
phrases.cultural_note: Eugène Boudin (1824–1898) was born in Honfleur and is celebrated for his breezy beach scenes at Trouville and Deauville — the first painter to consistently work outdoors en plein air. He became Monet's first teacher and mentor.

responses.english: On the first floor, room three.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the museum also has works by Monet and Courbet
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que le musée possède aussi des œuvres de Monet et de Courbet ?
phrases.pronunciation: ess kuh luh moo-ZAY poh-SED oh-SEE day ZUV-ruh duh moh-NAY ay duh koor-BAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum holds a rich collection beyond Boudin, including works by Corot, Courbet, Monet, Dufy, and Léger. Honfleur's artistic legacy spans from the Barbizon school to early Cubism.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if photos are allowed in the museum
phrases.text_local: Peut-on prendre des photos dans le musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: puh-TOHN PRAHN-druh day foh-TOH dahn luh moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: Photography rules vary by exhibition at the Musée Eugène Boudin.

phrases.text_local: Avez-vous un audioguide pour la visite du musée ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah-vay-VOO uhn oh-dee-oh-GEED poor lah vee-ZEET doo moo-ZAY
phrases.cultural_note: The museum offers audio guides in French and English. Given the richness of the Impressionist collection and the biographical story of Boudin's influence on Monet, the audio commentary significantly enhances the visit.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a student discount
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un tarif réduit pour les étudiants ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn tah-REEF ray-DWEE poor lay zay-too-DYAHN
phrases.cultural_note: The Musée Eugène Boudin offers reduced rates for students with valid ID.
